subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Book, sent down in truth from God, the Mighty, the All-Bestowing, and verily they are the Ancient Sign manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الکتاب نزلت بالحق من لدی الله العزیز الوهاب و انها لایه القدم بین
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @chastisement and requital
